headlines.title: House Republicans cancel vote curbing Trump on Iran
headlines.description: House Republicans delayed a vote on a war powers resolution that would restrict President Donald Trump’s ability to continue U.S. military operations in Iran.

headlines.title: Republicans cancel votes amid GOP fight over Trump’s ‘anti-weaponization’ fund
headlines.description: Objections to President Donald Trump’s controversial “anti-weaponization” fund prompted Senate Republicans to postpone votes to fund ICE and the Border Patrol until June.

headlines.title: Pressure on DNC Chair Ken Martin builds amid questions over how he handled the 2024 autopsy
headlines.description: The Democratic National Committee plunged into a fresh round of chaos after Chair Ken Martin was forced to release an autopsy report he commissioned about the failed 2024 presidential campaign.

headlines.title: Republicans Cancel Votes Amid Trump’s ‘Anti-Weaponization’ Fund
headlines.description: There is mounting frustration among some Republicans over President Donald Trump’s proposed spending, leading to both his $1 billion ballroom and the nearly $1.8 billion “anti-weaponization” fund hitting unexpected walls within the party. Objections over the latter fund prompted Republican senators to postpone a vote on an immigration bill and leave Capitol Hill for the week, according to two GOP sources. NBC’s Kelly O’Donnell reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: New Jersey voters split over GOP Rep. Tom Kean Jr.'s two-month mysterious medical absence
headlines.description: NBC News' Mel Zanona goes to GOP Rep. Tom Kean Jr.'s district to knock on his door and speak with constituents. The congressman's mysterious medical leave is already impacting his votes in Congress and could decide the balance of power in Washington in the midterm elections.

headlines.title: Trump says he’ll ‘try’ to attend son’s wedding, but it’s ‘not good timing’
headlines.description: President Trump told reporters at the White House that he is unsure if he will attend Donald Trump Jr. and Bettina Anderson’s wedding, citing the Iran war and “other things.”

headlines.title: Absence of USAID likely slowed Ebola detection and response, former officials say
headlines.description: The Trump administration hollowed out USAID last year, but the State Department denied the changes have hampered its response.

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

headlines.title: Map: How much you pay in federal and state gas taxes
headlines.description: As national gas price averages head toward $5 per gallon, one state has already suspended its gas tax, and now President Donald Trump and his Cabinet are talking about doing the same.

headlines.title: Trump says he might skip Donald Jr.’s wedding because of Iran
headlines.description: The president said that due to the Iran war and “other things,” he wasn’t sure if he’d be attending the nuptials of Donald Trump Jr. and Bettina Anderson this weekend.

headlines.title: Bipartisan bill to build women’s history museum falls after GOP amendment
headlines.description: Republicans amended the bill to say President Trump may pick an alternative site for the museum and specified it could include only “biological women.”

headlines.title: Trump’s $1.8B fund isn’t officially open yet. That hasn’t stopped applications.
headlines.description: Applications are already rolling into the Justice Department from hopefuls aiming for some of the nearly $1.8 billion “anti-weaponization” fund, even though the process can’t officially begin until commissioners are chosen to decide how the money is doled out.
